info.name: Conductor API
info.description: Conductor API collection for managing models, model runners, configurations, virtual model runners, and request history.

body.raw:
{
  "Name": "My Ollama Server",
  "ApiType": "Ollama",
  "Hostname": "localhost",
  "Port": 11434,
  "UseSsl": false,
  "HealthCheckUrl": "/",
  "HealthCheckMethod": "GET",
  "HealthCheckExpectedStatusCode": 200,
  "RigMonitor": {
    "Enabled": true,
    "Port": 9990,
    "UseSsl": false,
    "CollectDuringHealthCheck": true,
    "RequireReadyz": true,
    "HealthAffectedByRigMonitor": false,
    "TelemetryProfile": "GpuPlacement"
  }
}

{
  "Name": "Updated Endpoint",
  "RigMonitor": {
    "Enabled": true,
    "HostnameOverride": "rigmonitor-host.local",
    "Port": 9990,
    "UseSsl": false,
    "TimeoutMs": 5000,
    "CollectDuringHealthCheck": true,
    "RequireReadyz": true,
    "HealthAffectedByRigMonitor": false,
    "MaxTelemetryAgeMs": 30000,
    "CapabilitiesRefreshIntervalMs": 60000,
    "TelemetryProfile": "Custom",
    "TelemetrySelectors": ["system", "cpu", "memory", "gpu"]
  }
}

request.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.name: Ollama loaded

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_123",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 4211,
  "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
  "Message": "Model load probe completed on 1 of 1 endpoint(s).",
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_123",
      "EndpointName": "gpu-host-01",
      "ApiType": "Ollama",
      "BaseUrl": "http://gpu-host-01:11434",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OllamaGenerate",
      "RequestPath": "/api/generate",
      "DurationMs": 4211,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

response.name: vLLM verified

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_456",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 85,
  "OutcomeCode": "Verified",

response.name: Hosted provider verified remote

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "ModelRunnerEndpoint",
  "TargetId": "mre_789",
  "Model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 143,
  "OutcomeCode": "VerifiedRemote",
  "Message": "Hosted provider does not expose host-local loading; metadata verified model availability.",
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_789",
      "EndpointName": "openai-hosted",
      "ApiType": "OpenAI",
      "BaseUrl": "https://api.openai.com:443",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "VerifiedRemote",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OpenAIListModels",
      "RequestPath": "/v1/models",
      "DurationMs": 142,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [
        "KeepAlive"
      ],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Load Model On Virtual Model Runner

request.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.name: Selected endpoint loaded

originalRequest.description: Tenant-admin control-plane request. Hosted providers verify availability by metadata unless an explicit generation or embedding probe is requested.

response.body:
{
  "Success": true,
  "TenantId": "default",
  "TargetType": "VirtualModelRunner",
  "TargetId": "vmr_123",
  "Model": "gemma3:4b",
  "ProbeKind": "Auto",
  "DurationMs": 4211,
  "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
  "Message": "Model load probe completed on 1 of 1 endpoint(s).",
  "RoutingDecision": {
    "Success": true,
    "SelectedEndpointId": "mre_123",
    "EffectiveModel": "gemma3:4b"
  },
  "EndpointResults": [
    {
      "EndpointId": "mre_123",
      "EndpointName": "gpu-host-01",
      "ApiType": "Ollama",
      "Success": true,
      "OutcomeCode": "Loaded",
      "ProviderStatusCode": 200,
      "Mechanism": "OllamaGenerate",
      "RequestPath": "/api/generate",
      "DurationMs": 4211,
      "VerifiedLoaded": true,
      "IgnoredFields": [],
      "ErrorMessage": null
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Search request history entries with pagination and filtering.

query.description: Start of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Default: 1 hour ago
End of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Default: now
Filter by Virtual Model Runner GUID

request.description: Get aggregated request counts grouped by time buckets with success/failure breakdown. Returns time-bucketed data suitable for charting.

query.description: Explicit start of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Overrides range when paired with endUtc
Explicit end of time range (UTC, ISO 8601). Overrides range when paired with startUtc
Explicit chart bucket size in seconds
Filter by Virtual Model Runner GUID
Filter by requested or selected model

request.description: Get chart-ready request analytics: request volume, latency, stage breakdown, endpoint summaries, provider/token metrics, and slowest requests.
Get per-request analytics events and normalized timing stages for a captured request history entry.
Get request history entry metadata by ID.
Get full request history detail including request/response headers and bodies.
Delete a single request history entry by ID.
Delete all request history entries matching the filter criteria.

item.name: Get Effective Virtual Model Runner Configuration

request.description: Export all data as a JSON backup.
Restore from a JSON backup. Pass the backup JSON as the request body.
Validate a backup file without applying changes.
